evidence_quotes.quote: a game won't be accessible anymore for the buyers.
abandoning the game with no updates but also after certain time making it unplayable

paragraphs.text: Hello, I am writing this to express concern about how it's an ongoing trend for the game developers to release a game with promises of adding a lot of content in it and as time goes no real changes happen. Suddenly, you recieve news from a developer company that a game won't be accessible anymore for the buyers. With online games that I have experienced such unfairness are Propnight, Friday the 13th:The game,Resident Evil Re:Verse. Other games that will follow the same practice of not only abandoning the game with no updates but also after certain time making it unplayable will be games such as Evil Dead:The game, The Texas Chain Saw Massacre. This kind of practice shouldn't be allowed.
